hero.title: Full-Stack Web Developer & Business Informatics Student
hero.description: I specialize in building high-visual-quality, scalable, and secure web applications. My core stack includes Next.js 15, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and the Firebase ecosystem. My goal is to create perfect user experiences across all platforms.

about.desc2: Algorithms and data structures, object-oriented programming (C++), network architectures, operating systems, and mathematical foundations.
